title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic's engineering and product leaders present updates at the Code with Claude 2026 opening keynote held in Tokyo, Japan. The event showcases the company's latest developments and strategic direction.
writeup: The video is the opening keynote from Code with Claude 2026 in Tokyo, where Anthropic's engineering and product leaders present updates. It covers the company's latest developments and strategic direction. The keynote functions as Anthropic's framing of its priorities for the year, delivered directly by the teams building its products.
